description_long: This town hall is a stately, rectangular building with a steep, teal-colored hipped roof and a prominent central tower structure on top. The facade is painted a deep red and features symmetrical rows of tall, arched windows with decorative trim, as well as green-and-white striped awnings over the lower windows and entrances. On one corner, a cylindrical turret with a conical roof and cross finial adds a touch of historic character, while the main roof is punctuated by a raised central section with vertical supports. The main entrance is marked by a small awning and double doors, flanked by windows, and the building's overall appearance is both formal and inviting. The structure is likely constructed from masonry or brick, with metal or slate roofing and wooden or metal window frames. No visible signage or flags are present, and the building's ornamentation is restrained but elegant, with subtle moldings and window arches.
description: A stately red town hall with a teal hipped roof, arched windows, a corner turret, and striped awnings. The facade is symmetrical and features subtle decorative trim.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a small awning, three arched windows above, and a prominent corner turret with a conical roof.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the cylindrical turret and shows a single arched window and a striped awning on the right side of the building.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a row of four arched windows and two striped awnings, with the turret visible in the background.
description_view_3: This side view shows four tall arched windows and two striped awnings, with the turret on the far side and no main entrance visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Eclectic with Neo-Gothic and Victorian influences
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Arched window moldings, decorative window trim, striped awnings, and a cylindrical turret with a conical roof and cross finial
attribute_entrance_design: Single main entrance with a small arched awning, double doors, and decorative window trim above; no columns or portico
